message:
refactor(codegen): parse DEFAULT expressions directly via parse_sql_expr

Replace the indirect approach of wrapping DEFAULT SQL in a SELECT
statement and parsing the whole thing, with a direct call to the
parser's parse_expr entry point. This is simpler and avoids false
negatives from the SELECT-wrapper heuristic.

Both planner and vdbe codegens now propagate parse errors via Result
instead of silently falling back to a string literal, making malformed
DEFAULT clauses visible at compile time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
